They will receive an email from our partner Dropbox Sign.

UploadBankAccountStatementForm.title: Upload bank statement
UploadBankAccountStatementForm.copy: This will allow us to verify that this account belongs to your company

VerifyInfo.title: Why we ask for verification
VerifyInfo.copy: We ask customers to upload their bank statement when requesting cash to an unverified bank account to validate the identity and ownership
list: Ensure funds are sent securely and only to accounts owned by you
Only needs to be done once per bank account

DrawDepositMethodForm.bankTransferCopy: Would you like us to send the amount you request via bank transfer, immediately once your application has been approved?
DrawDepositMethodForm.bankTransferCopyLoc: Where would you like us to send your capital via bank transfer once your application has been approved?

DrawDepositMethodFormAmazon.title: Withdraw funds
DrawDepositMethodFormAmazon.fundsCanBeSent: Funds can only be sent to the bank account that is linked to your Amazon seller account. Confirm your account number ending in {{accountNumber}}
DrawDepositMethodFormAmazon.alert: If you wish to change the bank account where we’ll send your funds please <cta>contact our support</cta>
DrawDepositMethodFormAmazon.verificationError: Account number does not match the details registered with your Amazon seller account

DrawDepositMethodFormAmazonVerified.title: Withdraw funds
DrawDepositMethodFormAmazonVerified.fundsCanBeSent: Funds can only be sent to the bank account that is linked to your Amazon seller account
DrawDepositMethodFormAmazonVerified.alert: If you wish to change the bank account where we’ll send your funds please <cta>contact our support</cta>

LocDrawForm.title: New draw
LocDrawForm.chooseDrawAmountDescription: Choose the amount you’d like to have deposited as your first draw once your application is approved
LocDrawForm.minDrawValidationError: Minimum draw must be at least {{amount}}
LocDrawForm.maxDrawValidationError: Maximum draw must be at most {{amount}}
LocDrawForm.repaymentsDescription: The available options will depend on the repayment term you select

EligibilityOne.title: Getting funded
EligibilityOne.content: Fill in your business details, connect your accounts and provide a full picture of your business finances to receive a funding decision within 24 hours
EligibilityOne.content2: Our verification methods detect gaps in your data. Missing data can limit our ability to provide the funding you need

EligibilityTwo.title: Whats next?
EligibilityTwo.content: To provide you with a better, faster offer,  we’ll ask you to authorise secure, read-only connections to your banking, sales and accounting platforms.

EligibilityTwoSmallTier.title: Whats next?
EligibilityTwoSmallTier.content: To provide you with a better, faster offer,  we’ll ask you to authorise secure, read-only connections to your Amazon store data and your business bank accounts.

EligibilityTwoVariant.title: You could be eligible for up to
EligibilityTwoVariant.subtitle: Your final offer will be based on the data you submit during your application
features: Control the amount and term of your offer
Top-ups as you repay or as your business grows
Unlock access to our line of credit as your business scales
Clear, fixed cost with early prepayment options

belowExpectations.title: Less than what you’re looking for?
features: As you repay, you can automatically access top-up offers
Your offer amount will increase with your revenue
Unlock access to our line of credit as your business scales
Clear, fixed cost with early prepayment options

ReadyForFunding.title: You’re ready for funding!
ReadyForFunding.subtitle: Based on the information you’ve provided. You have a high chance of receiving an offer of up to {{amount}}
ReadyForFunding.readinessCheckDescription: You’re ready to successfully apply for funding from Uncapped
ReadyForFunding.offers: Highly likely to receive an offer
ReadyForFunding.offersDescription: Your profile suggests you are highly likely to receive an offer when you complete an application

BookCallBox.title: Book a call with your account manager
BookCallBox.content: We want to ensure we fully understand the unique needs of your business. Book a call with your account manager today to discuss your application.

success.title: Call booked!
success.content: We’ve sent you an email confirming the details
